purpose: Advisory HC Context Layer summary of protected surfaces for review routing.
authority_boundary: This JSON does not enforce protection and does not override CODEOWNERS, governance scripts, CI, protected indexes, or human review.

risk_routing.notes: Protected path changes require explicit review routing and human-supervised validation where applicable.
Eligibility is advisory and still subject to repository checks, branch protection, CI, and reviewer requirements.
Non-doc or ambiguous changes should be reviewed before merge.

required_validation: Run terminology guard when documentation or metadata changes are made.
Run docs drift guard when documentation or metadata changes are made.
Run canonical artifact guard when repository metadata changes are made.
Run relevant test subsets when touched scope requires.
Report any check that cannot run and do not imply success.
conflict_policy: If this JSON conflicts with CODEOWNERS or scripts/check_pr_governance.py, treat JSON as stale and report mismatch.
